title: Using points in a program
description:
Using points in a program

Using points in a program

When starting programs, the point file for the robot is loaded.  You can also load other points in the program using the LoadPoints statement.

Function main

		  Integer i

		  LoadPoints "model1.pts"

		  For i = 0 To 10

		    Jump pick

		    Jump place

		  Next i

		Fend
examples:
Function main
		  Integer i
		  LoadPoints "model1.pts"
		  For i = 0 To 10
		    Jump pick
		    Jump place
		  Next i
		Fend
